subject: fix(ui): remove migration blocks, change default combo to luxe
body:
Remove backward-compat localStorage migration for old lightTheme/darkTheme
keys — unnecessary since this is a pre-release branch. Old keys become
harmless dead data if present.

Change default combo from mono to luxe (fantasy/luxury). Updated in:
daisyuiThemes.js, useDarkMode.js, index.html flash prevention, index.css
DaisyUI defaults, generate-theme-meta.mjs, CLAUDE.md.

Tags: ui, themes, defaults
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: theme-combos
Semver: patch

title: remove migration blocks, change default combo to luxe
